# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy-dev
  - deploy-prod

variables:
  ARTIFACTS_DIR: "artifacts"
  DEPLOYMENT_CONFIG: "deployment.config"

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building binaries and configs..."
    - mkdir -p $ARTIFACTS_DIR
    - cp binary1 $ARTIFACTS_DIR/
    - cp binary2 $ARTIFACTS_DIR/
    - cp deployment.config $ARTIFACTS_DIR/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - $ARTIFACTS_DIR/binary1
      - $ARTIFACTS_DIR/binary2
      - $ARTIFACTS_DIR/deployment.config
    expire_in: 30 days

deploy-dev:
  stage: deploy-dev
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to dev environment..."
    - curl -o /tmp/artifacts.zip https://gitlab-ci-token:$CI_JOB_TOKEN@$CI_PROJECT_URL/$CI_COMMIT_SHA/$ARTIFACTS_DIR.zip
    - unzip /tmp/artifacts.zip -d /tmp/
    - cp /tmp/binary1 /usr/local/bin/
    - cp /tmp/deployment.config /etc/

deploy-prod:
  stage: deploy-prod
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to prod environment..."
    - curl -o /tmp/artifacts.zip https://gitlab-ci-token:$CI_JOB_TOKEN@$CI_PROJECT_URL/$CI_COMMIT_SHA/$ARTIFACTS_DIR.zip
    - unzip /tmp/artifacts.zip -d /tmp/
    - cp /tmp/binary1 /usr/local/bin/
    - cp /tmp/deployment.config /etc/
